input.title: The Longest Shift
input.description: A documentary following three emergency room nurses through one year of the pandemic's aftermath, revealing how a healthcare system pushed to breaking point changed the people who held it together.
critical_quotes: 'A devastating and essential portrait of what we asked of our healthcare workers.' — Variety
'Chen's camera earns the kind of trust that most filmmakers never achieve.' — IndieWire

input.title: Last Call
input.description: A documentary about a dive bar's final year before demolition.

input.title: Concrete Playground
input.description: A documentary following three families living in the same brutalist housing estate on the outskirts of Marseille over two years, as the city government debates whether to demolish or renovate the complex. The film is an intimate portrait of community life in architecture the world considers ugly.
input.target_audience: Art-house theatrical, European festival circuit, public broadcaster
critical_quotes: 'An extraordinary act of architectural empathy.' — Cahiers du Cinéma
'Moreau finds poetry in the places France would rather forget.' — Le Monde
